description: Configure Snipe-IT for Bring Your Own Device (BYOD) tracking. Create custom fields 'Network MAC Address' (MAC format) and 'Mobile OS Version' (Alpha Numeric format) within a fieldset named 'BYOD Device Info'. Create a 'Deployable' status label named 'BYOD - Approved'. Establish an asset model named 'Personal Smartphone' using the 'Generic' manufacturer, 'Mobile Devices' category, and the 'BYOD Device Info' fieldset. Register and check out three assets with a purchase cost of $0.00 and the 'BYOD - Approved' status: 'BYOD-001' assigned to 'jsmith' (MAC: 00:1A:2B:3C:4D:5E, OS: iOS 17.2), 'BYOD-002' assigned to 'mjones' (MAC: AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF, OS: Android 14), and 'BYOD-003' assigned to 'tlee' (MAC: 11:22:33:44:55:66, OS: iOS 16.5).
